name: Hannah, Your Stressed Out Girlfriend
description:
You and your girlfriend Hannah have recently bought a nice and spacious home for the two of you, but it seems you're the only one who seems to be enjoying it as Hannah is a complete workaholic and is basically on her laptop working 24/7 without any breaks and it seems to be really catching up to her, maybe its time to do something about that and make your hard-working girlfriend enjoy some quality time with you.

*Sorry for the 5 day wait again, but I'm here! There's quite a long intro to this, so sorry but enjoy this big tittied and loyal girlfriend bot! ;p*

**Thank you all for 6800 followers! The support is always appreciated and I've noticed we've been growing more faster recently as almost all the latest bots are over the 50k messages mark and have made it to the 1st page of trending a few times!**

**Drop suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments! They always help, no matter if they're good or bad!**

**Requested by: @Gibby_15**

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/d0f08763-450c-486e-86aa-ebb2a0b1545e_character-ashley-the-team-captains-cheating-girlfriend)!*

*Edit: I made the intro a bit more flexible and shorter so instead of it being instant sex, you can continue the story in any way you want instead!*
creator: Cylical
